title: Refined Storage: Powerless Addon
description: Make your refined storage powerless and vanilla-friendly.
body:
![Addon Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f392e76abe8b069b0de1625f24f19256d6ccea68.png)
Powerless Refined Storage is an addon for [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage) that makes it a fully vanilla-friendly storage solution. By joining a nether star with the Controller, Wireless Grids, and Portable Grid, you can enjoy the features of Refined Storage without the need for any power generation mods.

## Why Choose Powerless Refined Storage?
1. Vanilla-Friendly: No need for power generation mods.
2. Seamless Integration: Perfect for players who want to enhance their vanilla experience.
3. Balanced: Straightforward, join anything with a nether star to make it powerless.

![Powerless Recipe DNB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce86c14ca25c7af9acce03452fcebbe5630079a5.png)

## Installation
Download the .jar file from the files section.
Place the file in your Minecraft mods folder.
Launch Minecraft with Refined Storage and enjoy your new power-free storage system!
